socketedItems.secDescrText: Summons a totem that casts a beam of fire at you and each other totem you control, dealing burning damage to enemies caught in the beam. socketedItems.secDescrText: Place a Frost Shield that drains your energy shield for one second or until you run out, gaining stages while this drain occurs.
